content.claim: Among disadvantaged students in Hungary, only 12.1% reach a good level in at least one basic skill (reading, mathematics, science) in 2022 PISA, considerably below the EU average of 16.3%, with early school leaving rates among Roma at 58.7% versus 9.3% among non-Roma (2023).
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: These figures describe overall system equity performance; they do not isolate the specific causal contribution of the 6/8-year gimnázium tracks from other institutional factors
Early school leaving is influenced by multiple factors (labour market, family circumstances, residential disadvantage) beyond tracking structure
The baseline equity gaps are observed facts but not causally attributed to tracking in the source
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
